name: ai-translator-ts
author: AI Translator TS contributors
description: TypeScript rewrite of an AI file translator with OpenAI-compatible APIs, llama.cpp server support, and aria2 model downloads.

scripts.release:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage tar.gz --publish never
scripts.release:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.release:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis zip --publish never
scripts.release:all: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage tar.gz --win nsis zip --publish never
scripts.release:embedded: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.embedded.json --publish never
scripts.release:embedded:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.embedded.json --linux AppImage --publish never
scripts.release:embedded:linux:all: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.embedded.json --linux AppImage tar.gz --publish never
scripts.release:embedded:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.embedded.json --win nsis zip --publish never
scripts.release:embedded:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.embedded.json --mac dmg zip --publish never
